title: P0.2: Relationship Operators
description:
Semantic relationship operators from db4.ai for @dotdo/do

## Four Operators
- -> Forward Exact: 'Create new, belongs to parent' (e.g., Founder for Startup)
- ~> Forward Fuzzy: 'Find existing or create shared' (e.g., Industry, Tag)
- <- Backward Exact: 'Find entities referencing me' (e.g., Posts by Author)
- <~ Backward Fuzzy: 'Find semantically related' (e.g., Related Articles)

## TDD Cycles
1. Operator Parsing (parseOperator function)
2. Schema Integration (ref types with operators)
3. Traversal API (DO.traverse method)

## Files to Create
- src/relationships/operators.ts
- src/relationships/traversal.ts
- test/relationships/*.test.ts
close_reason: All traversal tests passing - operators, graph traversal, fuzzy stubs complete

title: [TDD] CodeExecutor Interface - Refactor Phase
description:
## Overview
Refactor CodeExecutor for production readiness.

## TDD Specification

### 🔄 Refactor Phase

1. **Security Hardening**
   - Add dangerous pattern detection (from mongo implementation)
   - Block eval, Function constructor access
   - Prevent prototype pollution
   - Add code length limits (100KB max)

2. **Performance**
   - Add execution metrics
   - Cache compiled functions where safe
   - Optimize context binding

3. **Extensibility**
   - Create WorkerCodeExecutor for Cloudflare Workers isolates
   - Create MiniflareCodeExecutor for testing
   - Add CodeExecutor factory function

4. **Documentation**
   - JSDoc for all public APIs
   - Usage examples
   - Security considerations

## Files to Update
- `src/sandbox/executor.ts` - Add hardening
- `src/sandbox/worker-executor.ts` - New: Workers isolate version
- `src/sandbox/miniflare-executor.ts` - New: Test version
- `src/sandbox/index.ts` - Factory and exports

## Depends On
- Green Phase

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests still pass
- [ ] Security tests added and passing
- [ ] Multiple executor implementations
- [ ] Full documentation
close_reason: Refactor complete - security hardening, multiple executors, full docs

title: P1.2: Reference Cascade Generation
description:
Automatic related entity generation for @dotdo/do

## db4.ai Pattern
When generating a Startup, automatically generate related Founders:
- Detect ->Type[] fields marked for cascade
- Generate parent entity first
- Generate children in parallel
- Support depth limiting

## TDD Cycles
1. Cascade Detection
2. Parallel Generation
3. Semantic ID Generation

## Files to Create
- src/ai/cascade.ts
- test/ai/cascade.test.ts

title: P0.1: Schema Validation System
description:
Zod-like runtime validation with fluent API for @dotdo/do

## TDD Cycles
1. SchemaType Base + Primitives (string, number, boolean, date)
2. Modifiers (required, optional, default, transform)
3. Composite Types (array, object, union)
4. Reference Types (ref, exact, fuzzy)
5. Fluent Schema Builder ($.schema, validate, toJSONSchema)
6. DO Integration (wire into create/update)

## Files to Create
- src/schema/types.ts
- src/schema/$.ts
- src/schema/validation.ts
- src/schema/json-schema.ts
- test/schema/*.test.ts

title: P1.1: Schema-Driven AI Generation
description:
Schema-driven AI content generation for @dotdo/do

## Key Pattern from db4.ai
Schema fields include AI hints that drive LLM generation:
- $.string().ai('Company name for branding')
- $.ref('User').ai('Who founded this company?')

## TDD Cycles
1. AI Hints on schema fields
2. JSON Schema with AI metadata
3. Generator Interface

## Files to Create
- src/ai/hints.ts
- src/ai/generator.ts
- test/ai/*.test.ts

title: [GREEN] Replace MCP Function Types with Specific Signatures
[TDD] Context Builder - Refactor Phase
description:
## Overview
Refactor context builder for extensibility and documentation.

## 🔄 Refactor Phase

1. **Add method signature extraction**
   - Parse function.toString() for param names
   - Support TypeScript type hints in JSDoc

2. **Add category grouping**
   - Group methods by prefix (crud_, thing_, action_)
   - Support @category decorator

3. **Add validation**
   - Warn on methods in allowedMethods but not on instance
   - Validate method is actually callable

4. **Documentation**
   - Full JSDoc
   - Examples in docstrings

title: P2.1: Hybrid Search
description:
FTS5 + Vector search with RRF merging for @dotdo/do

## Components
- FTS5: SQLite full-text search with BM25 scoring
- Vectorize: Semantic similarity via embeddings (interface)
- RRF: Reciprocal Rank Fusion to merge results

## TDD Cycles
1. FTS5 Integration
2. Vector Search Interface
3. RRF Merging

## Files to Create
- src/search/fts.ts
- src/search/vector.ts
- src/search/rrf.ts
- test/search/*.test.ts

title: P2.2: Batch Enrichment
description:
Adaptive concurrency batch processing for @dotdo/do

## db4.ai Pattern
- Batch processing with adaptive concurrency
- Increase concurrency on success streaks
- Decrease by 50% on rate limits (429)
- Decrease by 25% on other errors

## TDD Cycles
1. Basic Batch Processing
2. Adaptive Concurrency
3. Execution Modes (Lazy/Eager)

## Files to Create
- src/batch/processor.ts
- src/batch/concurrency.ts
- test/batch/*.test.ts
